title: Commons Integration
description: The Commons integration connects Parthenon to collaborative research networks, enabling federated analysis, shared cohort definitions, and cross-institutional study coordination. Researchers can publish and discover phenotypes, analysis packages, and evidence synthesis results across participating sites.
tips: Register your data source with the Commons to make your site discoverable to network researchers without exposing patient-level data.
Use federated cohort generation to run identical cohort definitions across multiple sites and aggregate summary statistics centrally.
Publish validated phenotypes to the Commons Phenotype Library to accelerate collaborative research across the network.
Coordinate study package distribution through Commons to ensure all participating sites execute identical analysis specifications.
Review data partner agreements and governance requirements before initiating cross-site analyses.
